View.Name: {91EFA64A-2B87-4ABD-9FA0-BC9E765C7234}
View.CustomFormatter: {"tileProps":{"$schema":"https://developer.microsoft.com/json-schemas/sp/v2/tile-formatting.schema.json","width":260,"height":320,"hideSelection":true,"fillHorizontally":true,"formatter":{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"sp-card-container"},"children":[{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"sp-card-defaultClickButton"},"customRowAction":{"action":"defaultClick"}},{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"ms-bgColor-white sp-css-borderColor-neutralLight sp-card-borderHighlight sp-card-subContainer"},"style":{"overflow":"show","overflow-wrap":"break-word","inline-size":"min-content","word-break":"break-word","white-space":"wrap"},"children":[{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"sp-card-displayColumnContainer"},"children":[{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"title":"=if ([$Title] == '', if([$ServicesReceived.lookupValue]=='', ' - ', [$ServicesReceived.lookupValue]), [$Title])","class":"ms-fontColor-neutralPrimary sp-card-content sp-card-highlightedContent","role":"heading","aria-level":"4"},"style":{"overflow":"show","overflow-wrap":"break-word","inline-size":"min-content","word-break":"break-word","white-space":"wrap"},"txtContent":"=toLocaleDateString([$Date]) + ': ' + if([$ServicesReceived.lookupValue]=='', ' - ', [$ServicesReceived.lookupValue])"}]},{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"sp-card-displayColumnContainer"},"children":[{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"class":"ms-fontColor-neutralSecondary sp-card-label"},"txtContent":"[!Recipient.DisplayName]"},{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"title":"[$Recipient]","class":"ms-fontColor-neutralPrimary sp-card-content "},"txtContent":"=if ([$Recipient] == '', '–', [$Recipient.lookupValue])","style":{"overflow":"show","overflow-wrap":"break-word","inline-size":"min-content","word-break":"break-word","white-space":"wrap"}}]},{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"sp-card-displayColumnContainer"},"children":[{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"class":"ms-fontColor-neutralSecondary sp-card-label"},"txtContent":"[!PI.DisplayName]"},{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"title":"[$PI]","class":"ms-fontColor-neutralPrimary sp-card-content "},"txtContent":"=if ([$PI.lookupValue] == '', '–', [$PI.lookupValue])","style":{"overflow":"show","overflow-wrap":"break-word","inline-size":"min-content","word-break":"break-word","white-space":"wrap"}}]},{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"sp-card-displayColumnContainer"},"children":[{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"class":"ms-fontColor-neutralSecondary sp-card-label"},"txtContent":"[!Service_x0020_Type_x003a_hiddenP.DisplayName]"},{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"title":"[$Service_x0020_Type_x003a_hiddenP]","class":"ms-fontColor-neutralPrimary sp-card-content "},"txtContent":"=if ([$Service_x0020_Type_x003a_hiddenP] == '', '–', [$Service_x0020_Type_x003a_hiddenP])","style":{"overflow":"show","overflow-wrap":"break-word","inline-size":"min-content","word-break":"break-word","white-space":"wrap"}}]},{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"sp-card-displayColumnContainer"},"children":[{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"class":"ms-fontColor-neutralSecondary sp-card-label"},"txtContent":"[!Notes.DisplayName]"},{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"class":"ms-fontColor-neutralPrimary sp-card-content "},"txtContent":"=substring( if( [$Notes] == '', '', if( lastIndexOf( replace( replace( replace([$Notes],'&','&'), ' ', '' ), '<div>', '<div class=\"\">' ), '\">' ) >= 0, substring( replace( replace( replace( [$Notes], '&', '&' ), ' ', ''), '<div>', '<div class=\"\">' ), lastIndexOf( replace( replace( replace( [$Notes], '&', '&' ), ' ', ''), '<div>', '<div class=\"\">' ) ,'\">' ) + 2, indexOf( replace( replace( replace( [$Notes], '&', '&' ), ' ', ''), '<div>', '<div class=\"\">' ) , '</' ) - 3 ), replace( replace( replace( [$Notes], '&', '&' ), ' ', ''), '<div>', '<div class=\"\">' ) ) ) , 0, 120) + '...'","style":{"overflow":"show","overflow-wrap":"break-word","inline-size":"min-content","word-break":"break-word","white-space":"wrap","font-weight":"lighter","font-size":"smaller"}}]}]}]}}}
